audit_result.proof_trace: The quota check exits immediately when quota reaches zero, breaking out of the sidecar loop mid-block. This violates atomicity: if Block B has sidecars [1,2,3] and quota=2, only sidecars 1 and 2 are sent, leaving sidecar 3 unsent despite sidecar 1 being included in the response.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker requests a large range forcing quota exhaustion mid-block. Peer receives partial sidecars for the final block, causing reconstruction failure or wasted bandwidth as the incomplete set is below the PeerDAS threshold required for data availability.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-043.text: All sidecars of a block must be included in by_range response if any sidecar is included.
PROP-6a4369e9-inv-043.assertion: forall block, resp: any_sidecar_included(block, resp) => all_sidecars_included(block, resp)
